summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for FinAI Django REST API. All core functionality working correctly with 100% success rate on primary endpoints.

minor_issues.issue: DateTime field warnings for naive datetime objects

minor_issues.details: Django timezone warnings for Transaction and Report datetime fields
Organization QuerySet needs ordering for consistent pagination

ai_integration_issues.impact: Forecast endpoint works but AI service may have connectivity issues
